Who We Are
Built Different.
Because We
Build It Ourselves.

Fence Fab Warehouse is Adelaide's only fencing company with its own manufacturing workshop. While other local fencers order standard panels and put them up, our team fabricates custom gates, posts and fencing from raw steel and aluminium — right here in Adelaide.

That means better quality, tighter tolerances, and a fence that fits your property perfectly. No compromise. No off-the-shelf.

Home / Services

Our Services

Every service is designed, fabricated and installed by our own team at our Adelaide workshop. No subcontractors. No off-the-shelf panels.

Service 01
Custom Aluminium Slat Fencing Adelaide

Aluminium slat fencing is one of the most popular choices for Adelaide homeowners wanting privacy without sacrificing style. At Fence Fab Warehouse, every slat panel and post is manufactured in our own Adelaide workshop — meaning you get a fence perfectly suited to your home, your site conditions, and your taste.

Why Homeowners Choose Slat Fencing
  • Complete privacy from the street with a contemporary, clean aesthetic
  • Available in any Dulux powder-coat colour — match your home's palette exactly
  • Aluminium never rusts, rots or requires repainting — extremely low maintenance
  • Custom heights, slat spacing and post designs for every property
  • Suitable for street frontages, side boundaries, pool surrounds and more
Our Process
1
Free On-Site Measure & Quote
We visit your property to understand your site conditions, levels and style preferences.
2
Design Consultation
Colour, height, slat spacing, post style and gate options confirmed before fabrication.
3
Workshop Fabrication
Cut, welded and powder-coated in our Adelaide workshop. Typical lead time 2–3 weeks.
4
Professional Installation
Installed by our own team — not subcontracted. Site clean-up and final inspection included.
Project Photos
Frequently Asked Questions
How long does slat fencing last in Adelaide's climate?
Aluminium powder-coated slat fencing typically lasts 25+ years in Adelaide conditions. The coating resists UV fading, salt air and temperature extremes.
Can you match the fence colour to my home?
Yes. We powder-coat to any Dulux colour. Bring us a paint chip or colour code and we'll match it exactly.
Do I need council approval for a front fence?
It depends on your suburb and fence height. We can advise — just ask when we come out to quote.
Service 02
Colorbond Fencing Adelaide

Colorbond steel fencing is Australia's most trusted boundary fencing solution. Durable, low-maintenance and available in a wide range of colours — it suits every Adelaide suburb from Glenelg to the Adelaide Hills. Fence Fab installs Colorbond fencing across all Adelaide metro suburbs with competitive pricing and quality workmanship.

Service 04
Steel & Ornamental Fencing Adelaide

From sleek modern vertical spear-top fencing to ornate heritage balustrades — Fence Fab Warehouse fabricates custom steel fencing for Adelaide properties of every style and era.

Steel Fencing Gallery
Service 05
Retaining Walls Adelaide

Adelaide's variable soil types and sloping terrain make retaining walls a practical necessity for thousands of homeowners. Fence Fab designs and builds retaining wall solutions built to last in Adelaide's conditions.

Service 06
Privacy Screens & Louvres Adelaide

Custom louvre panels and privacy screens fabricated in-house — in any powder-coat colour, any size. Perfect for alfresco areas, pool equipment screening and outdoor entertaining spaces.

Home / About

Adelaide's Local Fencing
Manufacturer — Our Story

We're not a franchise. We're not a national chain. We're a local Adelaide business that takes pride in building things properly.

BLD Licence 344397 · ABN 32 681 290 942
Our Story
We Started With One Belief: Build It Right.

Fence Fab Warehouse started with a simple belief: if you're going to install fences for Adelaide homeowners, you should be able to build them too.

What began as a fencing installation business grew into something much more — a full manufacturing operation right here in Adelaide. Today, our workshop at Salisbury Plains fabricates custom gates, posts, slat panels and steel fencing for residential and commercial properties across the metro area.

We've recently stepped away from the franchise model entirely, so we can focus on what matters most: doing exceptional work for Adelaide homeowners without the constraints that come with a corporate structure.

"Supply the best.
Install with pride.
Deliver with confidence."
— Fence Fab Warehouse Brand Promise
Warehouse & Supply
Trade & Retail Supply
Premium fabricated fencing products. Trade and retail supply of aluminium slat panels, steel fencing, Colorbond products, gates and all hardware. Expert product knowledge from people who actually install what they sell.
Installation Division
Residential & Commercial
Fence and retaining wall installations across all Adelaide suburbs. Fully managed projects from measure and quote through to final inspection. No subcontractors — ever.
